name: Refurbished Cylinder Portable Bluetooth Speaker with Strap - heyday™ Black - Target Certified Refurbished: Wireless Mounted Audio Device
description:
This Cylinder Portable Bluetooth Speaker with Strap from heyday™ is perfect for blasting tunes around the house, singing in the shower or jamming out poolside. A handy strap makes it easy to carry, while the compact, waterproof design lets you use it just about anywhere. Connect to your Android or iPhone device for hands-free listening, and plug into a USB for easy charging. A simple interface with a play/pause button and volume buttons make it easy to manage your sound. The Bluetooth speaker even has an aux input, so you can use it with non-Bluetooth devices.

Target certified refurbished products are tested and inspected so they will function as, and arrive at your doorstep in a like new condition. All units include our 90-day certified refurbished satisfaction guarantee and all primary original accessories.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
